scripts/append-today-brief.ps1.brief: Daily brief auto-generation script — PLAN.md mapping, functional summary, next actions
scripts/append-today-brief.ps1.purpose: Generates Chinese daily brief with functional area grouping, PLAN.md phase summary, file change tables, and intelligent next actions from project state
scripts/append-today-brief.ps1.detail: Added: functional area overview with file lists, PLAN.md phase change summary, intelligent next actions from project state checks, time column in overview table
